Project notes:
- Framework: Next.js App Router with TypeScript
- Brand: busserzXcodehoppers restaurant website
- Pages: home, menu, products, about, contact
- Products data source: async helper in src/lib/products.ts (replace with workspace fetch later)
- Deployment: GitHub Pages workflow and optional Vercel config
